purpose: Sanitized MCP server inventory for rebuilding Codex tooling without copying secrets.

notes: The local Codex config may contain secrets. This JSON intentionally redacts them.
Prefer environment variables or local-only config for real tokens.

context7.auth_required: API key recommended or required depending on Context7 mode
project_use: Up-to-date documentation lookup for external libraries and tools
Fallback reference when local source cannot answer tool usage questions
notes: Do not copy the real API key from local Codex config into tracked docs.

project_use: Browser/UI verification for generated documentation sites or web tools
Screenshot checks when local HTML/mdBook pages are rendered
notes: Not normally needed for GBA runtime UI; use mGBA Live MCP for emulator screens.

project_use: Inspect own fork PRs and CI when explicitly requested
Do not open PRs or push to RH-Hideout upstream without explicit permission and confirmed target
notes: Repository policy: upstream/RHH is fetch-only. Pushing or PRs are allowed only to the user's own fork when requested.

project_use: Definitions and diagnostics when clangd can parse the file

known_limitations: battle_setup.c diagnostics still reported unknown type name u8, so diagnostics are reference-only until clangd config is improved.

project_use: Screenshot, OAM, memory, input, and Lua-assisted GBA investigation
UI transition verification after battle/menu changes

observed.system_mgba_qt_limitation: Observed package did not support --script for mgba-live bridge startup.

project_use: Symbol overview for large C files
Find symbol bodies and textual patterns without reading entire files
Persist local project memories for investigation continuity
notes: .serena/ is local-only and excluded from git.
For this project, use Serena mostly read-only unless the user explicitly allows source edits.

semgrep.uses_network: only for AppSec Platform findings/auth features; local custom scans can run without auth
semgrep.auth_required: not required for local custom-rule checks; required for platform findings
project_use: Custom static checks over C snippets or selected files
Detect risky patterns such as callback assignments, global party writes, flag/var access, and direct save writes
AST inspection for compact parser-level checks

observed.custom_rule_smoke_test: Passed with relative in-memory file path semgrep-mcp-smoke.c.
observed.path_scan_limitation: A direct semgrep_scan path attempt failed in this session with an MCP/RPC connection error. Prefer semgrep_scan_with_custom_rule for targeted checks, or use CLI fallback if needed.
observed.sandbox_note: Plain semgrep --version tried to write ~/.semgrep settings in the sandbox; env HOME=/tmp semgrep --version worked.

notes: SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN is not set and should not be committed.
Use platform findings only after explicit auth decision.
